title: Add furigana normalization before card creation
description: Track the existing local changes that lightly normalize and correct LLM-generated furigana markup before audio generation and Anki note creation.
acceptance_criteria: Furigana annotations get spacing normalized, safe even-length kanji compounds split into per-kanji annotations, unsafe compounds are preserved, TTS input strips furigana markup, and tests cover the behavior.
close_reason: Added light furigana normalization/correction before card creation and tests for spacing, safe compound splitting, preserved unsafe compounds, and TTS markup stripping.

title: Add MCP validation-only card creation endpoint
description: Add the first card-creation endpoint to flashgen_mcp that validates incoming card JSON against the shared schema and returns structured validation responses without creating Anki notes yet.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint validates shared card request fields, has focused tests for valid and invalid payloads, and does not duplicate FlashGen engine rules outside the shared schema.

title: Define shared FlashGen card request and result schema
description: Create the shared request/result models for CLI and MCP/server use so both front doors agree on field names, validation, defaults, and structured success/error payloads.
acceptance_criteria: Schema covers japanese, english, notes, tags, deck, japanese_prompt, english_prompt, normalized result fields, and error categories documented in docs/SYSTEM_DESIGN.md.

title: Merge flashgen-mcp into flashgen monorepo
description: Move the early flashgen-mcp scaffold into the flashgen repo, keep the src layout, initialize repo-local Beads, and rewrite the system design around one repo, one card-generation engine, and two front doors: CLI and MCP/server.
acceptance_criteria: MCP docs and scaffold live in flashgen; SYSTEM_DESIGN.md describes the monorepo architecture and Lightsail deployment model; packaging/dependencies support uv and tests; health test passes.
notes: Created during consolidation from /Users/stevensaito/ML/flashgen-mcp. Simple copy is acceptable because the MCP repo is still early scaffold and planning artifacts.
close_reason: Merged early flashgen-mcp scaffold and docs into flashgen, added uv project metadata, rewrote SYSTEM_DESIGN.md for one repo / one engine / CLI plus MCP front doors, and verified MCP health test.

title: Add multi-provider TTS request contract
description: Implement the approved FlashGen change to support request-level tts_provider and tts_model fields, default Gemini TTS, preserve OpenAI translation, and surface the resolved TTS settings in result JSON.

title: Document FlashGen JSON request and result contract
description: Update docs/SYSTEM_DESIGN.md so the LLM input JSON and FlashGen output JSON fields match the README, including response-card-only prompt/audio fields.
acceptance_criteria: SYSTEM_DESIGN.md lists the input fields accepted from LLM JSON and the output fields emitted by FlashGen, including local_audio_path and response-card prompt fields.
close_reason: Updated SYSTEM_DESIGN.md with the LLM input JSON and FlashGen result JSON contracts, including local_audio_path and Response-card-only prompt/audio fields.

title: Add Lightsail deployment docs and service assets
description: Document and add source-controlled deployment assets for running flashgen_mcp from the flashgen repo on Lightsail, including dependency sync, environment variables, systemd restart flow, and AnkiConnect reachability.
acceptance_criteria: Docs explain that Lightsail clones flashgen, source edits happen on the development machine, deployment pulls commits, uv syncs dependencies, and the service runs flashgen_mcp.app:app. Any systemd/nginx examples live under docs/deployment or deploy.

title: Extract shared FlashGen engine modules from flashgen.py
description: Move reusable card-generation logic out of the CLI entrypoint into focused package modules while preserving the current jpflash stdin/stdout behavior.
acceptance_criteria: flashgen.py becomes a thin CLI wrapper; shared code is importable by CLI and MCP; existing furigana/create_flashcard tests continue to pass; no duplicate Anki/OpenAI orchestration exists in flashgen_mcp.
